name: @splotch/asset-gen
description: AI/sharp asset-generation pipeline for Splotch. NOT a workspace and NOT separately installed — its dependencies (sharp, @google/genai) live in the repo-root package.json so the root node_modules stays flat for cap sync + patch-package (ADR-0029/0053). Run these via `npm run gen:*` from the repo root, or the aliases below from inside this folder; either way binaries resolve from the hoisted root node_modules. Do not `npm install` here.
